item.title: SmuView [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: SmuView [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
SmuView
(Graphic Apps)
SmuView is a GUI for sigrok that supports power supplies, electronic loads and all sorts of measurement devices like multimeters, LCR meters and so on.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

item.title: STRP x DOZE [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: STRP x DOZE [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: crankv2
item.itunes:summary:
STRP x DOZE
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
━━━━━━━━
STRP Universal GMS DOZE Module

Improve Performance & Optimize Google Play Services for a Better Battery Backup !
━━━━━━━━
Run Script >
su -c DOZE

Run STRP Gms doze Checker >
su -c STRPC
━━━━━━━

Enjoy this most Powerful Doze Module u will find out there !


[read more]

item.title: Memory Card Data Recovery Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Memory Card Data Recovery Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: repairmemorycard
item.itunes:summary:
Memory Card Data Recovery Tool
(Utilities)
Repair Memory Card Downloads program to rescue all types of files in midi, avi, mov, jpg and png formats lost due to disaster strike in multimedia card in real time. www.repairmemorycard.com offers reliable and flexible memory card recovery tool to repair reformatted or accidentally erased pictures from mini SD card in simplified manner. Advanced recovery software for memory card rescue missing digital files photo snaps from bad sector of SDHC plus card in simple procedure. Windows based memory card recovery application has simple GUI interface to retrieve undetectable birthday photos from compact flash memory card successfully. Enhanced SD card recovery solution saves valuable time to get back crucial data from formatted SDHC card in easiest way. Browse memory card recovery program to undelete software/hardware failure photographs images from micro MMC card in quick time. Professional card recovery technology repairs virus infected CF card flash files video songs clips in an accurate manner. Reliable and flexible memory card recovery tool retrieves inaccessible digital picture video audio clips from secure digital card comfortably. Advanced MMC card recovery application rescue important digital data deleted due to human error or power fault in micro SDHC card successfully.Feature* New memory card recovery software rescue virus infected micro SDHC, CF, SD and MMC card files folders in minimal time.* Professional card recovery program retrieves formatted mini SD and SDHC plus card multimedia data in simplified manner.* Expert SD card recovery tool rescue deleted pictures due to human error or power faults from memory card using devices in easiest manner.* Advanced memory card recovery tool repairs undetectable video audio songs collection from compact flash memory card in quick time.

[read more]

item.title: Digital Picture Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Picture Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: repairmemorycard
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Picture Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Affordable Digital Camera Repair application helps user to support all types of graphical file formats including jpg, jpeg, gif, bmp, png,mp3, wmv, mov, mpeg, avi ,doc, txt, pdf, ppt, xls and other file formats. www.repairmemorycard.com utility facilitates to retrieves missing or deleted picture even if message like drive not formatted is displayed on computer system while accessing digital camera. Digital camera recovery software helps user to Support all type of digital camera storage media including ultra compact digital camera, digital single lens reflex camera, digital video camera, professional camera, point and shoot camera, novelty camera, range finder camera and others of different pixels and sizes of cameras. Download data recovery software offers facility to support all popular brands of digital camera like Sony, Kingston, LG, Konica, Olympus, Canon, Nikon, HP, Samsung, Fuji, Kodak, Toshiba, Panasonic and other famous brands. Reliable camera data restore tool helps to regain and restore all types of data lost due to human error, camera fault, and hardware / software malfunction, files corrupted due to virus attack, improper handling or many other common reasons. Reliable camera data recovery software facilitates user to easily support all popular windows operating system like Windows 11, Windows 10, Windows 8, XP, 7 and WinVista x64 and many other. Features:* Digital camera recovery software helps user to undelete unintentionally deleted data due to various logical errors.* Best digital camera data recovery application offers advance graphical user interface helps user to easily understand the working without requiring any special guidance.* Reliable camera data recovery software provides option to restore all lost or deleted data with help of disk scanning technique.

[read more]
item.description:
Digital Picture Recovery Software

item.title: Android Phone Data Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Android Phone Data Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: repairmemorycard
item.itunes:summary:
Android Phone Data Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Don’t feel upset if you lost entire files from android cell phone memory, use Repair Android program which facilitates you to get back crucial zip files, video clips and other data without any data damaged from android mobile phone or tablet PC instantly. Website www.repairmemorycard.com offers android data retrieval program to revive lost multimedia files such as video clips from different types of android device in few easy steps.

[read more]

Android Phone Data Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Don’t feel upset if you lost entire files from android cell phone memory, use Repair Android program which facilitates you to get back crucial zip files, video clips and other data without any data damaged from android mobile phone or tablet PC instantly. Website www.repairmemorycard.com offers android data retrieval program to revive lost multimedia files such as video clips from different types of android device in few easy steps.

item.title: File Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: File Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: filerecovery
item.itunes:summary:
File Recovery Software
(Utilities)
www.filerecoverysoftware.org provides you complete solution in form of File Recovery Software that assists user to restore permanently deleted crucial files and office documents from all kind of fixed or removable USB media in fast and secure manner. Automatic freeware data retrieval tool salvages lost encrypted files having different size and extension just in few mouse clicks. Most affordable File Recovery Software facilitates you to repair complete data from hard disk drive lost due to various reasons such as worm attack, improper disk format, software failure, mistakenly deletion, power fault, damaged drive partition, format or reformat of memory card, logical error, human error, OS failure, improper device management, pen drive pulled out suddenly while operating with device and many more. Simple to operate data rescue utility does not require any previous technical knowledge to make use of software. With the aid of data repair application you can successfully retrieves your missed files, audio, birthday video, office tutorials, songs, digital pictures, text files and xml documents etc saved in your PC or laptop with less efforts. File Recovery Software supports all latest manufacturing brands available in market including Sony, Sandisk, HP, Lexar, Kingston, Kingmax, Nikon, Transcend, Fujifilm and many others. Most demanded File Recovery Software gives you full functionality and flexibility for the recovery of files which are deleted forever from emptied recycle bin folder or by using shift + del command. Inexpensive files restoration tool successfully runs on all major Windows OS like Windows 11/10/8/7 etc with no extra software installation.Features:* Image restoration tool can be operated even through a novice user just because of its graphical interface.* Data revival tool recovers deleted digital images and database tables from damaged SD card.* Specialize File Recovery Software allows you to take back up of lost data from USB drives.

[read more]
item.description:
File Recovery Software
(Utilities)
www.filerecoverysoftware.org provides you complete solution in form of File Recovery Software that assists user to restore permanently deleted crucial files and office documents from all kind of fixed or removable USB media in fast and secure manner. Automatic freeware data retrieval tool salvages lost encrypted files having different size and extension just in few mouse clicks. Most demanded File Recovery Software gives you full functionality and flexibility for the recovery of files which are deleted forever from emptied recycle bin folder or by using shift + del command. Inexpensive files restoration tool successfully runs on all major Windows OS like Windows 11/10/8/7 etc with no extra software installation.Features:* Image restoration tool can be operated even through a novice user just because of its graphical interface.* Data revival tool recovers deleted digital images and database tables from damaged SD card.* Specialize File Recovery Software allows you to take back up of lost data from USB drives.

[read more]

File Recovery Software
(Utilities)
www.filerecoverysoftware.org provides you complete solution in form of File Recovery Software that assists user to restore permanently deleted crucial files and office documents from all kind of fixed or removable USB media in fast and secure manner. Automatic freeware data retrieval tool salvages lost encrypted files having different size and extension just in few mouse clicks. Most affordable File Recovery Software facilitates you to repair complete data from hard disk drive lost due to various reasons such as worm attack, improper disk format, software failure, mistakenly deletion, power fault, damaged drive partition, format or reformat of memory card, logical error, human error, OS failure, improper device management, pen drive pulled out suddenly while operating with device and many more. Simple to operate data rescue utility does not require any previous technical knowledge to make use of software. With the aid of data repair application you can successfully retrieves your missed files, audio, birthday video, office tutorials, songs, digital pictures, text files and xml documents etc saved in your PC or laptop with less efforts. File Recovery Software supports all latest manufacturing brands available in market including Sony, Sandisk, HP, Lexar, Kingston, Kingmax, Nikon, Transcend, Fujifilm and many others. Most demanded File Recovery Software gives you full functionality and flexibility for the recovery of files which are deleted forever from emptied recycle bin folder or by using shift + del command. Inexpensive files restoration tool successfully runs on all major Windows OS like Windows 11/10/8/7 etc with no extra software installation.Features:* Image restoration tool can be operated even through a novice user just because of its graphical interface.* Data revival tool recovers deleted digital images and database tables from damaged SD card.* Specialize File Recovery Software allows you to take back up of lost data from USB drives.

[read more]

item.title: GS GRAPHIC RENDERINGS [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GS GRAPHIC RENDERINGS [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GS GRAPHIC RENDERINGS
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
GS Graphic Renderings Tweak is a powerful tool designed to enhance the graphic rendering capabilities of Android devices. With this tweak, users have the freedom to choose between three advanced rendering options: OpenGL ES, Sikagl, and VulkanSika.
OpenGL ES, a widely-used graphics API, provides a solid foundation for rendering graphics on Android devices. It offers a high level of compatibility and performance, ensuring smooth and visually appealing graphics for gaming and multimedia applications.

Sikagl, an innovative rendering framework, introduces cutting-edge features and optimizations to deliver stunning visuals. With Sikagl, users can experience enhanced shading, lighting, and special effects, pushing the boundaries of graphic rendering on their Android devices.

VulkanSika, a modern and efficient graphics API, takes advantage of the latest hardware capabilities to deliver unparalleled performance and visual fidelity. By leveraging multi-threading and low-level hardware control, VulkanSika optimizes resource utilization and provides a smooth and responsive user experience, especially for graphically-intensive applications.

With the GS Graphic Renderings Tweak, users can seamlessly switch between these rendering options based on their preferences and specific application requirements. Whether they seek compatibility, advanced features, or maximum performance, this tweak empowers users to unlock the full potential of their Android devices and enjoy a customized and immersive graphical experience.
[read more]
item.description:
GS GRAPHIC RENDERINGS

OpenGL ES, a widely-used graphics API, provides a solid foundation for rendering graphics on Android devices. It offers a high level of compatibility and performance, ensuring smooth and visually appealing graphics for gaming and multimedia applications.

Sikagl, an innovative rendering framework, introduces cutting-edge features and optimizations to deliver stunning visuals. With Sikagl, users can experience enhanced shading, lighting, and special effects, pushing the boundaries of graphic rendering on their Android devices.

VulkanSika, a modern and efficient graphics API, takes advantage of the latest hardware capabilities to deliver unparalleled performance and visual fidelity. By leveraging multi-threading and low-level hardware control, VulkanSika optimizes resource utilization and provides a smooth and responsive user experience, especially for graphically-intensive applications.

With the GS Graphic Renderings Tweak, users can seamlessly switch between these rendering options based on their preferences and specific application requirements. Whether they seek compatibility, advanced features, or maximum performance, this tweak empowers users to unlock the full potential of their Android devices and enjoy a customized and immersive graphical experience.
[read more]

OpenGL ES, a widely-used graphics API, provides a solid foundation for rendering graphics on Android devices. It offers a high level of compatibility and performance, ensuring smooth and visually appealing graphics for gaming and multimedia applications.

Sikagl, an innovative rendering framework, introduces cutting-edge features and optimizations to deliver stunning visuals. With Sikagl, users can experience enhanced shading, lighting, and special effects, pushing the boundaries of graphic rendering on their Android devices.

VulkanSika, a modern and efficient graphics API, takes advantage of the latest hardware capabilities to deliver unparalleled performance and visual fidelity. By leveraging multi-threading and low-level hardware control, VulkanSika optimizes resource utilization and provides a smooth and responsive user experience, especially for graphically-intensive applications.

With the GS Graphic Renderings Tweak, users can seamlessly switch between these rendering options based on their preferences and specific application requirements. Whether they seek compatibility, advanced features, or maximum performance, this tweak empowers users to unlock the full potential of their Android devices and enjoy a customized and immersive graphical experience.
